# Transcrição: 15. Day 90 Contact – Management Call

- **Fonte:** 15. Day 90 Contact – Management Call
- **Duração:** 00:42

## [00:00 - 00:42]

Okay, it's three months after the first contact. It's 90 days. I want somebody else other than yourself now to intervene. This is called the manager call. The manager is going to call the client and ask one simple question. Why haven't you done business with us? And listen, do not try to close Mr. Manager or third party. I want you just to find out why haven't you done business with the firm and with Grant up to this point? Collect the data. You don't need to close right now. Mr. Manager, Mr. Manager, Mr. Third Party, just give the information to the salesperson. If this 90-day call turns into a hot lead that's ready now, take advantage of it. I'll see you at 100 days.
